case_title: PATEL, ANDY vs. ANDERSON, BERNARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, ANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, BERNARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 171 FELL ST #41, LEASE FORFEITED
